data.title: Tesla Could Touch $2 Trillion Market Cap By End Of 2025, Says Tech Bull: FSD, Robotaxis, And Cybercab 'Keys' For EV Giant
data.description: Wedbush Securities analyst Dan Ives sees EV giant Tesla achieving a $2 trillion market cap by 2025-end in a bull case scenario.

data.title: Gold To Shine Bright In 2025 As Top Investment Bank Predicts Bullish Outlook Amid Trade Tensions
data.description: Gold is projected to continue its record-breaking trend, with prices averaging $2,760 an ounce in 2025.

data.title: Microsoft Brings iPhone File Sharing To Windows PCs With New Phone Link Update: Here's What You Need To Know
data.description: Microsoft's latest Phone Link update enables seamless file sharing between iPhones and Windows PCs, marking a significant step toward improved cross-platform integration, though some features like app mirroring and group iMessages remain unavailable.

data.title: Will Google's New 'Willow' Chip Break Bitcoin? Some Dismiss It As 'Fantasy' While Others Flag 'Risk' That Isn't Immediate

data.title: SpaceX's Starship Returns To Starbase As Elon Musk's Company Gears Up For 7th Test Flight
data.description: SpaceX has rolled out its Starship spacecraft to the launch pad at Starbase for testing ahead of its next flight test, implying an imminent launch.
